title: 242303001 Refrigerator Air Damper Control Assembly Compatible with Frigidaire/Crosley Fridge AP5788340 PS8746718 EAP8746718 3016452 (120V 50/60Hz)
features: Replace Part: This refrigerator relay's model is 242303001, which is very easy to replace that can interoperate with 242303001,AP5788340, PS8746718, EAP8746718, and 3016452 of refrigerator air damper control assembly

Temperature Control: The refrigerator air door assembly adopts scientific temperature control technology to make the cold air flow can be better regulated, so as to provide better cooling effect for the refrigerator

Stable Operation: The working voltage of this 242303001 refrigerator air damper control assembly is 120V, and the working frequency is 50/60Hz, which can carry out safe and stable refrigeration work inside the refrigerator, which is very practical and convenient

Easy to Install: You just need to disconnect the power, remove the shock absorber, unplug the power supply, remove the ground wire and foam shutter, and finally install the new shock absorber control assembly
Size: 13*9.98*7.97cm/5.11*3.93*3.14in. This plastic refrigerator air door has strong compatibility, you can buy and use it without worrying about mismatches
description: Specification: Material: Plastic Voltage: 120V Frequency: 50/60Hz Model: 242303001 Replace Part Number: 242303001,AP5788340, PS8746718, EAP8746718, and 3016452 Size: 13*9.98*7.97cm/5.11*3.93*3.14in Note: Please allow for manual measurement errors. Package Included: 1 * 242303001 Refrigerator Air Damper Control Assembly
